title: Network and traits
text:
Three different ways to define robustness: - functional trait space - static network - dynamic secondary extinctions
What are the relationships between these different facets of robustness. It makes sense to have a global view, in particular in plant-pollinator network, where traits govern species interactions.
Some steps that need to be done:

title: Network and traits
text:
Notes Ismaël

Coux et al. (2016):

Code and data
PCoA is used to summarise traits, could investigate the role of each trait individually in the explaining species position in the network.

title: Network and Traits Project
text:
This project focuses on the link between the originality of species traits and their place within the interaction networks. It is largely inspired by the work of (Coux et al. 2016).
We provide reports detailing our analyses, and the associated manuscript




References

Coux, Camille, Romina Rader, Ignasi Bartomeus, and Jason M. Tylianakis. 2016. “Linking Species Functional Roles to Their Network Roles.” Ecology Letters 19 (7): 762–70. https://doi.org/10.1111/ele.12612.
